---
title: "nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops"
generated: true
signature-hash: 75dcfa32cbdcf5e1
description: "Tensor shape and layout utilities."
listing:
  id: nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Tensor shape and layout utilities.

The low-level building blocks that downstream consumers compose, grouped by
the kind of manipulation they perform:

- **Axis normalisation**: [`standard_axis_number`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/standard_axis_number.qmd) and
  [`negative_axis_number`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/negative_axis_number.qmd) turn negative or out-of-range axis indices
  into canonical positive indices.
- **Reshape helpers**: [`fold_axis`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/fold_axis.qmd) splits one axis into two,
  [`unfold_axes`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/unfold_axes.qmd) merges several axes into one, and
  [`fold_and_promote`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/fold_and_promote.qmd) and [`demote_and_unfold`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/demote_and_unfold.qmd) are the
  corresponding composite operations.
- **Broadcasting helpers**: [`orient_and_conform`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/orient_and_conform.qmd) pads a vector with
  singleton axes so that it broadcasts against a reference tensor,
  [`broadcast_ignoring`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/broadcast_ignoring.qmd) broadcasts every axis except a named one, and
  [`promote_to_rank`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/promote_to_rank.qmd) raises a tensor to a target rank.
- **Complex utilities**: [`complex_decompose`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/complex_decompose.qmd) splits a complex tensor
  into amplitude and phase, [`complex_recompose`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/complex_recompose.qmd) reconstructs it, and
  [`amplitude_apply`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/amplitude_apply.qmd) applies a real-valued function to a complex tensor
  via its amplitude.
- **Masking helpers**: [`conform_mask`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/conform_mask.qmd), [`apply_mask`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/apply_mask.qmd) and
  [`mask_tensor`](nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/mask_tensor.qmd) restrict or reshape tensors according to a mask.

This module gathers the externally useful subset of these utilities into a
public namespace, re-exporting the shared implementations with documentation
aimed at consumers.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops-symbols}
:::
